electroacoustic.directivity: Horizontal: 70 or 110 deg symmetric, or 90 deg asymmetric (left/right) via Panflex; Vertical: variable, set by element count and array curvature (WST line source)
electroacoustic.components: 2x 12-inch neodymium LF cone drivers (bass-reflex, L-Vents) + 1x 4-inch diaphragm neodymium HF compression driver on DOSC waveguide with Panflex; 2-way active
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 143 dB peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, K3_70 preset; bandwidth measured at -10 dB with K3_70 preset

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), interchangeable IN/LINK; pinout 1+/1- = LF, 2+/2- = HF
connection.breakouts: DOFILL-LA8 (8-point PA-COM to 2x 4-point speakON) for driving two 2-way active enclosures from one PA-COM run; DO3WFILL for one active enclosure plus two passive subs

physical.dimensions_mm: 950 W x 287 H x 403 D (front face 357 wide; trapezoidal)
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic birch plywood with die-cast aluminum side panels, coated steel grille and acoustically neutral 3D fabric; finish Pantone 426 C dark grey brown

rigging_accessories: K3-RIGBAR (rigging bar and pullback, includes LA-SLING2T)

usage: Compact long-throw line source built around full-size K2 transducers, aimed at mid-sized festivals, tours, performing-arts venues, corporate and special events where K1/K2 footprint is too large.
Each K3 is 2-way active and needs two amp channels, so one amplified controller drives multiple boxes: 6 per LA12X, 8 per LA7.16(i), and 2 per LA4X.
Choose the horizontal preset to match coverage: K3 70 for tightest long throw and peak SPL, K3 110 for wide near-field fills, or K3 90 for asymmetric (left/right) audience shapes via Panflex.

Strong reinforced-LF contour down to 42 Hz lets K3 work stand-alone without flown subs; pair with KS28 (or KS21) for infra extension, using the matching xxxx_60 sub preset for crossover alignment around 60 Hz.
Flown arrays scale to 16 boxes (safe limit) under K3-BUMP, up to 24 with the right mechanical conditions; always validate any array in Soundvision for safety factor and stability.
Doubles as outfill or delay for K1/K2 main hangs, and can carry Kara II as downfill (KARA-DOWNK3, up to 12 K3 + 6 Kara II safe) for extended vertical coverage.
